'''鈭歽-h-h''' ('''yahaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:veel|veel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:veel|veel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-h-h
|-
! Lemma
| yahaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yahahithi|yahahithi]] || [[word:yahahiji|yahahiji]] || [[word:yahahishi|yahahishi]] || [[word:yahahi|yahahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahahuthuth|yahahuthuth]] || [[word:yahahujuj|yahahujuj]] || [[word:yahahushush|yahahushush]] || [[word:yahah|yahah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahahuthu|yahahuthu]] || [[word:yahahuju|yahahuju]] || [[word:yahahushu|yahahushu]] || [[word:yahahu|yahahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahahufuth|yahahufuth]] || [[word:yahahufuj|yahahufuj]] || [[word:yahahufush|yahahufush]] || [[word:yahahuf|yahahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yahahethe|yahahethe]] || [[word:yahaheje|yahaheje]] || [[word:yahaheshe|yahaheshe]] || [[word:yahahe|yahahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahahothoth|yahahothoth]] || [[word:yahahojoj|yahahojoj]] || [[word:yahahoshosh|yahahoshosh]] || [[word:yahah|yahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahahotho|yahahotho]] || [[word:yahahojo|yahahojo]] || [[word:yahahosho|yahahosho]] || [[word:yahaho|yahaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahahofoth|yahahofoth]] || [[word:yahahofoj|yahahofoj]] || [[word:yahahofosh|yahahofosh]] || [[word:yahahof|yahahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yahah忙th忙|yahah忙th忙]] || [[word:yahah忙j忙|yahah忙j忙]] || [[word:yahah忙sh忙|yahah忙sh忙]] || [[word:yahah忙|yahah忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahahathath|yahahathath]] || [[word:yahahajaj|yahahajaj]] || [[word:yahahashash|yahahashash]] || [[word:yahah|yahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahahatha|yahahatha]] || [[word:yahahaja|yahahaja]] || [[word:yahahasha|yahahasha]] || [[word:yahaha|yahaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahahafath|yahahafath]] || [[word:yahahafaj|yahahafaj]] || [[word:yahahafash|yahahafash]] || [[word:yahahaf|yahahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yahahasha|yahahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyahahasha|goyahahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyahahasha|gokiyahahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yahahn眉sha|yahahn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyahahnkn眉sha|goyahahnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyahahn眉sha|gokiyahahn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yahahsh毛sha|yahahsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyahahnksh毛sha|goyahahnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyahahsh毛sha|gokiyahahsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yahahrosha|yahahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyahahnkrosha|goyahahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyahahrosha|gokiyahahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yahahmusha|yahahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahahnkmusha|goyahahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahahmusha|gokiyahahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yahahsherasha|yahahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyahahnksherasha|goyahahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyahahsherasha|gokiyahahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yahahngasha|yahahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyahahnkngasha|goyahahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyahahngasha|gokiyahahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yahahyasha|yahahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyahahnkyasha|goyahahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyahahyasha|gokiyahahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yahahyamasha|yahahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyahahnkyamasha|goyahahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyahahyamasha|gokiyahahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yahahn眉sh毛sha|yahahn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyahahnkn眉sh毛sha|goyahahnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyahahn眉sh毛sha|gokiyahahn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yahahn眉rosha|yahahn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyahahnkn眉rosha|goyahahnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyahahn眉rosha|gokiyahahn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahahn眉musha|yahahn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahahnkn眉musha|goyahahnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahahn眉musha|gokiyahahn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yahahsh毛n眉sha|yahahsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyahahnksh毛n眉sha|goyahahnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyahahsh毛n眉sha|gokiyahahsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yahahsh毛rosha|yahahsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyahahnksh毛rosha|goyahahnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyahahsh毛rosha|gokiyahahsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahahsh毛musha|yahahsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahahnksh毛musha|goyahahnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahahsh毛musha|gokiyahahsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yahahron眉sha|yahahron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyahahnkron眉sha|goyahahnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyahahron眉sha|gokiyahahron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yahahrosh毛sha|yahahrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyahahnkrosh毛sha|goyahahnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyahahrosh毛sha|gokiyahahrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahahromusha|yahahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahahnkromusha|goyahahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahahromusha|gokiyahahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yahahmun眉sha|yahahmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyahahnkmun眉sha|goyahahnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyahahmun眉sha|gokiyahahmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yahahmush毛sha|yahahmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyahahnkmush毛sha|goyahahnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyahahmush毛sha|gokiyahahmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yahahmurosha|yahahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyahahnkmurosha|goyahahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyahahmurosha|gokiyahahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yahah|yahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙h忙h|y忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyahah|hoyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙h忙h|hoy忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyahah|hohoyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙h忙h|hohoy忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yahah|n眉yahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙h忙h|n眉y忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yahah|n眉n眉yahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙h忙h|n眉n眉y忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yahah|n茂yahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙h忙h|n茂y忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yahah|n茂n茂yahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙h忙h|n茂n茂y忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyahah|luyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙h忙h|luy忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyahah|luluyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙h忙h|luluy忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyahah|liyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙h忙h|liy忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyahah|liliyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙h忙h|liliy忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyahah|koyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙h忙h|koy忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyahah|kokoyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙h忙h|kokoy忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyahah|keyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙h忙h|key忙h忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyahah|kekeyahah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙h忙h|kekey忙h忙h]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
